problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization may resolve Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
